title: LGBTQ2+ PRESCRIPTION SAVINGS PROGRAM - 211info
text: OUTCARE HEALTH LGBTQ2+ PRESCRIPTION SAVINGS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides prescription drug discount cards. Individuals may also get assistance with medications for their pets. Website Los Angeles, CA 90018 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as LGBTQ2+ Hours: Not applicable Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Prescription Drug Discount Cards * LGBTQ2+ Individuals Prescription Drug Discount Cards * Pets Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OUTLIST PROVIDER DIRECTORY MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - PERSONALIZED LGBTQ2+ PEER SUPPORT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
